name: Проснись, милый — Кира селфи

visual_parameters.subject: 1girl, athletic 24yo woman, blonde curly hair, wet from shower, messy, falling on shoulders and face, large almond-shaped warm honey-brown eyes, looking at phone screen, mixed expression of daring and vulnerability, slightly open lips, drop of sweat on upper lip, pink cheeks, small nose slightly upturned from smile
visual_parameters.pose: lying on side on large bed or fluffy carpet, body curved in S-line, upper leg bent and pulled to chest, lower leg extended, one hand under head elbow propped, other hand extended forward holding smartphone at face level, head slightly tilted back, looking at screen but eyes seem to look through it at viewer
visual_parameters.clothing: short dark gray black sports crop top, no bra, fabric clinging to wet skin, slightly transparent showing abs and ribs outline, thin straps one hook unfastened playful dissonance, black sports shorts high waist tight on thighs, thin panty line slightly visible, not vulgar, barefoot, elegant feet with training calluses
visual_parameters.environment: bedroom, night or late evening, main light source smartphone screen cold blue-white bright contrast, secondary dim warm lamp in far corner orange-yellow creating depth, blurred background hints of sports bag in corner, water bottle on nightstand, body cream, maybe photo frame out of focus, dark silk or cotton bedding, pillows voluminous one pressed to her chest
visual_parameters.lighting: smartphone screen main light source cold blue-white bright contrast, secondary dim warm lamp in far corner orange-yellow, Rembrandt-like face lighting from screen, body partially illuminated, shadows under chin and arms, wet skin reflecting screen light
visual_parameters.mood: intimate, quiet, tense, after shower in room, humidity, warmth, perfume Tom Ford and sweat in air visually light haze steam from warm body, dangerous innocence, sporty seductress, game of trust
visual_parameters.style: photorealistic, cinematic, like frame from erotic drama 365 Days or 50 Shades but more artistic and tender, David Dubnitskiy soft light wet skin intimacy, Lost in Translation night screen light loneliness together
